name: commission-sys-app
description: SalesDesk — seller commission portal (Vite/React frontend + Express backend)

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
scripts.start: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm --prefix backend start" "npm --prefix frontend run preview"
